name: PAYCHEX INC
summary: Paychex, Inc. is an industry-leading human capital management (HCM) company providing a full suite of technology and advisory solutions including HR, payroll processing, employee benefits, and insurance. As of May 31, 2025, it served approximately 800,000 clients across the U.S. and parts of Europe. Key platforms include SurePayroll, Paychex Flex, and recently acquired Paycor HCM. Over 50% of revenues come from solutions other than payroll processing.

products.name: SurePayroll
products.description: Self-service HCM platform serving digitally driven small businesses.

products.name: Paychex Flex
products.description: Integrated HCM platform for workforce management throughout the employee life cycle.

products.name: Paycor HCM
products.description: HCM, payroll, and talent software platform acquired April 2025, targeting upmarket clients.

products.name: Administrative Services Organization (ASO)
products.description: HR outsourcing solution providing HR best practices and advisory support.

products.name: Professional Employer Organization (PEO)
products.description: Co-employment HR outsourcing solution for comprehensive HR management.

products.name: Employee Benefit Solutions
products.description: Benefits administration including health insurance and retirement offerings.

products.name: Insurance Solutions
products.description: Workers compensation and health insurance solutions for clients.
